name: Lorenzo Coviello
tagline: Machine Learning at Google · MIT Media Lab · UC San Diego
bio: I work on the design and development of machine learning infrastructure and modeling techniques for Google Ads, including data analytics and A/B testing. I also covered a Tech Lead role in Google Shopping. Previously, I was a Postdoctoral Associate at the MIT Media Lab. I hold a PhD in Electrical and Computer Engineering from UC San Diego, and MS/BS degrees in Telecommunication Engineering from the University of Padova, Italy.
researchStatement: My research spans machine learning systems, computational social science, and social network analysis. Full publication list on Google Scholar.
